name: TIBCO Software, Inc.
description: TIBCO Software Inc., now a business unit of Cloud Software Group, is a global provider of enterprise software solutions designed to help organizations solve complex business challenges. The company specializes in real-time data integration, analytics, event processing, and process automation. By leveraging AI-enabled, composable platforms, TIBCO empowers enterprises to connect their data, amplify intelligence, and make smarter, faster decisions. With a history of continuous modernization, TIBCO assists global businesses in moving toward predictive operations, allowing them to anticipate customer needs, identify new opportunities, and proactively mitigate potential risks in an increasingly data-driven digital landscape.
